metadata:
Public Works Stormwater and Transportation Division1989RedmondGIS.DBO.CenterlineFirstvector digital data SMMS_Citation_Linkages_Hyperlinked: false RedmondGIS.DBO.CenterlineServer=GeminiDB; Service=sde:sqlserver:GeminiDB; Database=RedmondGIS; Version=dbo.DEFAULTThe dataset contains street centerline network within the City of Redmond city limits. The feature can be directly linked to the pavement management, sidewalk, and bike lanes databases. It is also used as the basemap for the Police Department Dispatch System.The purpose of this dataset is to provide a right-of-way centerline network within the City of Redmond city limitsen1989Presentground conditionIn workContinually-122.171116-122.03473247.72408547.6231481311158.5603541344165.188059230161.655322266440.844000RedmondCenterlineLandbaseNetworkRight of WayRoadStreetAll access to the dataset will be as Read-OnlyDistribution to the consultant and customers should be processed through the GIS Services Group, Finance and Information Services department. All requestors are required to fill a request form and sign disclaimer statementmailing and physical address15670 NE 85th ST, MS:3SFNRedmondWA98052USA(425) 556-2134(425) 556-4200!_gisservices@redmond.govMonday-Friday 9AM to 5PM SMMS_Contact_Email_Hyperlinked: true City of Redmond, GIS ServicesSMMS_ID_Browse_Graphic_Hyperlinked: 0Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.4000City of Redmond Stormwater and Engineering Division, King County GIS, and GIS Services1989UnknownParcelsFirstmap SMMS_Citation_Linkages_Hyperlinked: false SMMS_Citation_Source_Time_Period:
SMMS_Type: 1 SMMS_Dataset_Capture_Browse: true SMMS_Dataset: SMMS_Dataset_NorthArrow: 0 SMMS_Dataset_Legand: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer: SMMS_DatasetLayer_Order: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Type: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Location: \\SID\GISUSER\geographic_information\Data\LandBase\Centerline.mdb SMMS_DatasetLayer_Name: Centerline SMMS_DatasetLayer_LabelVisible: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Style1: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Color: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Weight: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer: SMMS_DatasetLayer_Order: 1 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Type: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Location: \\BUZZ\GISUSER\geographic_information\Data\LandBase\MasterParcel.mdb SMMS_DatasetLayer_Name: RightOfWay SMMS_DatasetLayer_LabelVisible: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Style1: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Color: 0 SMMS_DatasetLayer_Weight: 0 SDE Feature ClassnonenonenonenonenoneCenterline was imported from Microstation (CAD) file into GeoMedia environment. The process was accomplished through CSD (Cad Server Schema Description) method of GeoMedia Professional version 3.0. New database schema was created1999mailing and physical address15670 NE 85th ST, MS:3FSNRedmondWA98073USA(425) 556-2134(425) 556-4200!_gisservices@redmond.govMonday-Friday 9AM to 5PM SMMS_Contact_Email_Hyperlinked: true City of Redmond, GIS ServicesMetadata imported.C:\DOCUME~1\xqin\LOCALS~1\Temp\xmlE3.tmp2008011415285000UnknownVector SMMS_Captured: true 806378137.000000298.257222GCS_North_American_1983_HARNNAD_1983_HARN_StatePlane_Washington_North_FIPS_4601_FeetNorth American Vertical Datum of 19881.000000Survey FeetExplicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinatesCenterlineEdge geometry featureGIS Services, Public Works Transportation DivisionFeature Class0FIDFIDOID400Internal feature number.EsriSequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.ConstYearConstruction yearGIS Services, Public Works Transportation DivisionAs needed SMMS_Captured: true ConstYearDouble19188d_StatusStatus of the street segmentGIS ServicesACTActiveCONSTConstructionABNAbandonREMRemovedPLANSystem PlanUNKUnknownAs needed SMMS_Captured: true d_StatusString600ExcludeA field required by Spillman Police Dispach system, which indicates whether the centerline should be included in Spillman's internal validation process.GIS ServicesBLANKthe centerline will be included in Spillman's internal validation processNOT BLANKthe centerline will be excluded from Spillman's internal validation processAs needed SMMS_Captured: false ExcludeString100FromLeftThe theoretical starting house number (an integer) for the left side of the street.GIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: false FromLeftInteger10100StreetWidtStreetWidtDouble19188FromRightThe theoretical starting house number (an integer) for the right side of the streetGIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: false FromRightInteger10100d_Classifid_ClassifiDouble19188d_Ownershid_OwnershiString600FromStreetBegining cross-street name (located at either south or west end of segment)GIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: true FromStreetString5000d_DataSourd_DataSourString600d_InsideCid_InsideCiString300la_evnLaw Reporting zone even side of the street segment. Used in Spillman system.GIS ServicesAPolice district A, for reporting purpose only. The old Law dispatch zone A was merged into zone E and zone C since October, 2005.EPolice district E, refer to zone E prior merging with police district A.CPolice district C, refer to zone C prior to merging with zone AGPolice district GOPolice district OAs needed SMMS_Captured: false la_evnString500la_oddLaw Reporting zone odd side of the street segment. Used in Spillman system.GIS ServicesAPolice district A, for reporting purpose only. The old Law dispatch zone A was merged into zone E and zone C since October, 2005EPolice district E, refer to zone E prior merging with police district ACPolice district E, refer to zone C prior to merging with zone AGPolice district GOPolice district OAs needed SMMS_Captured: false la_oddString500LeftCityThis field indicates the city code for the left side of the centerline. This is reserved for the Spillman system, the Redmond Police Department dispatch software.GIS ServicesREDRedmondKIKirklandBEBellevueKCKing CountySAMSammamishAs needed SMMS_Captured: false LeftCityString300LeftZipThis field indicates the Zip Code for the left side of the centerlineGIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: false LeftZipString500LocationA field requied by Spillman Police Dispach system. Is appended to addresses as a comment. This is a free text field that can contain helpful information that will appear for the dispatcher when an address is used within the given address range of the line segment. Used in Spillman system.GIS ServicesNone planned SMMS_Captured: false LocationString1500lz_evnLaw Dispatch zone even side of the street segment. Used in Spillman system.GIS ServicesCPolice district CEPolice district EGpolice district GOPolice district OAs needed SMMS_Captured: false lz_evnString500lz_oddLaw Dispatch zone odd side of the street segment. Used in Spillman system.GIS ServicesCPolice district CEPolice district EGPolice district GOPolice district OAs needed SMMS_Captured: false lz_oddString500RightCityThis field indicates the city code for the right side of the centerline. This is reserved for the Spillman system, the Redmond Police Department dispatch software.GIS ServicesREDRedmondKIKirklandBEBellevueKCKing CountySAMSammamishAs needed SMMS_Captured: false RightCityString300RightZipThis field indicates the Zip Code for the right side of the centerlineGIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: false RightZipString500SideThis field indicates which side of the centerline has the address. Enter ‘B’ alwaysGIS ServicesEEven side of the centerline has addressOOdd side fo the centerline has addressBBoth side of the centerline has addressesBlankSame as "B", both side of the centerline has addresses.As needed SMMS_Captured: false SideString100StreetNameStreet nameGIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: true StreetNameString5000ToRightThe theoretical ending house number (an integer) for the right side of the streetGIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: false ToRightInteger10100ToStreetEnding cross-street name (located at either north or east end of segment)GIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: true ToStreetString5000ToLeftThe theoretical ending house number (an integer) for the left side of the street.GIS ServicesAs needed SMMS_Captured: false ToLeftLong Integer10100StreetNa_1StreetNa_1String5000FireArteriFireArteriInteger550surfacesurfaceString200Surface of the road: 1 = paved; 2 = gravelShapeShapeGeometry000Feature geometry.ESRICoordinates defining the features.MaxSpeedLiMaxSpeedLiInteger550d_ConstByd_ConstByString1000Project type that created the CenterlineCIPCapital Improvement ProjectDEVPrivate DeveloperANXAnnexationPSEPuget Sound EnergyUNKUnknownKCKing CountyWSDOTWashington State DOTROWRight of WayDateCreateDateCreateDate800CreatedByCreatedByString5000ArcGIS Editor Tracking field. System-generated username of who created the feature.DateModifiDateModifiDate800ModifiedByModifiedByString5000ArcGIS Editor Tracking field. System-generated username of who most recently modified the feature.StAlias1StAlias1String5000Any alternate names or aliases for the street such as routes, spelling variations, or established shortcuts for Spillman users. Value is managed by Lucity upon ‘Save’ when in ‘Lucity Watching’ mode or after force-syncing GIS features into LucityCalcLengthCalcLengthDouble19188Length of line feature geomtry; managed by Lucity.GlobalIDGlobalIDString3800Unique identification automatically calculated by ArcGIS and used with geodatabase Windows Server 2016 Technical Preview Version 10.0 (Build 20348) ; Esri ArcGIS 13.3.0.51575Centerline1311158.5603541344165.188059266440.844230161.6553221-122.171116-122.03473247.72408547.62314811-122.543980-122.06813647.71222547.151222The purpose of this layer is to provide a right-of-way centerline network within the City of Redmond city limits. <DIV STYLE="text-align:Left;"><DIV><DIV><P><SPAN>This layer contains street centerline network within the City of Redmond city limits. The layer can be directly linked to the pavement management, sidewalk, and bike lanes databases. It is also used as the basemap for the Police Department Dispatch System.</SPAN></P></DIV></DIV></DIV>CenterlineLandbaseNetworkRight of WayRoadStreet<DIV STYLE="text-align:Left;"><DIV><DIV><P STYLE="margin:0 0 11 0;"><SPAN><SPAN>While the data have been tested for accuracy and are properly functioning, the City of Redmond disclaims any responsibility for the accuracy or correctness of the data.</SPAN></SPAN></P><P STYLE="margin:0 0 11 0;"><SPAN><SPAN>The foregoing warranty is exclusive and in lieu of all other warranties of merchantability, fitness for particular purpose and/or any other type whether expressed or implied.</SPAN></SPAN></P><P STYLE="margin:0 0 11 0;"><SPAN><SPAN>In no event shall the City of Redmond become liable to users of these data, or any other party, for any loss or damages, consequential or otherwise, including but not limited to time, money, or goodwill, arising from the use, operation or modification of the data. In using these data, users further agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless City of Redmond for any and all liability of any nature arising out of or resulting from the lack of accuracy or correctness of the data, or the use of the data.</SPAN></SPAN></P><P STYLE="margin:0 0 11 0;"><SPAN><SPAN>Please acknowledge the City of Redmond as a source when City of Redmond data are used in the preparation of reports, papers, publications, maps, and other products.</SPAN></SPAN></P><P STYLE="margin:0 0 11 0;"><SPAN>To ensure that appropriate documentation and data limitations are provided, these databases should not be redistributed to any other parties.</SPAN></P></DIV></DIV></DIV>New centerlines added after Plat, Short Plat recordingISO 19115 Geographic Information - MetadataDIS_ESRI1.0dataset002Server=GeminiDB; Service=sde:sqlserver:GeminiDB; Database=RedmondGIS; Version=dbo.DEFAULTArcSDE ConnectionSDE Feature ClassShapefile0.000NAD_1983_HARN_StatePlane_Washington_North_FIPS_4601_FeetEPSG6.3(9.0.0)020260601
